topic_analysis_user_prompt_append: Prioritize CPA, affiliate operations, media buying workflows, trackers, creatives, moderation, farm, source volatility and 2026 platform shifts. Avoid generic B2B/SaaS angles.
clusters_en: facebook farm setup and account resilience
tiktok affiliate funnels and creative iteration
telegram communities mini apps and retention
tracker attribution postbacks and signal recovery
anti-detect browsers team SOP and workflows
nutra crypto igaming finance traffic shifts in 2026
clusters_ru: TikTok-воронки и итерации креативов под affiliate
Telegram-комьюнити, mini apps и удержание аудитории
трекеры, postback, атрибуция и восстановление сигналов
anti-detect браузеры, роли команды и SOP
сдвиги трафика в nutra, crypto, iGaming и finance в 2026
article_structures_en: Hook -> what changed -> operator impact -> examples -> checklist
Problem -> stack -> exact steps -> failure cases -> verification
Case context -> setup -> metrics -> bottlenecks -> reusable template
Trend brief -> source signals -> implications -> action plan -> summary
How-to -> prerequisites -> implementation -> debugging -> final SOP
article_structures_ru: Хук -> что изменилось -> влияние на оператора -> примеры -> чеклист
Проблема -> стек -> точные шаги -> типовые фейлы -> проверка
Контекст кейса -> сетап -> метрики -> узкие места -> шаблон
Trend brief -> сигналы источника -> выводы -> план действий -> итог
How-to -> prerequisites -> внедрение -> отладка -> финальный SOP
article_user_prompt_append_en: Write for affiliate operators. Prefer practical details, current platform behavior, tradeoffs, and reusable workflows over generic theory.
article_user_prompt_append_ru: Пиши для операторов affiliate-команд. Приоритет: практические детали, актуальное поведение платформ, tradeoffs и переиспользуемые workflows, а не общая теория.

image_color_schemes.instruction: Dark cinematic palette, deep shadows, high contrast accents.
Neon cyber palette with glowing accents on dark base.
Obsidian dark base with cool blue highlights and clean editorial contrast.
Charcoal foundation with muted teal emphasis and low-noise gradients.
Deep midnight palette with warm amber accents.

image_compositions.instruction: Strong perspective vanishing point pulling viewer inward.
Strong diagonal flow with dynamic motion and tension.

preview_image_prompt_template: Create a {{image_style}} editorial hero image for article "{{title}}" in {{lang}}. Theme: CPA backstage, media buying operations, trackers, creatives, sources, affiliate workflows, dark neon city-console mood. No text, no logos, 16:9.
